title: 2025-10-20 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 4.74
description: New daily signal for 2025-10-20: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 4.74/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-10-20, the score printed 4.74/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
